description: Cost and latency estimates for SGE pipeline vs Baseline LightRAG

notes.embedding: mxbai-embed-large-v1 (1024d, local Ollama, zero API cost)
notes.stage2_cost: One LLM call per dataset for schema induction (~500 input + ~200 output tokens)
notes.stage3_cost: Zero additional LLM cost (serialization is deterministic)
notes.lightrag_cost: LLM calls for entity extraction (~2 calls per chunk: extract + summary)

who.label: WHO Life Expectancy
who.notes: Same number of chunks; SGE overhead is only Stage 2 schema induction

summary.sge_overhead: < 1% additional cost (1 Stage 2 LLM call per dataset)
summary.key_finding: SGE adds negligible cost overhead (<1%) over vanilla LightRAG because: (1) Stage 1 is deterministic (zero LLM), (2) Stage 2 adds only 1 LLM call, (3) Stage 3 serialization is deterministic. The main cost is LightRAG's entity extraction which is identical for both.

det_parser_cost.note: Zero LLM cost — purely deterministic rule-based extraction
